mapper.select: SELECT article_id, user_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = article.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, test_drive_available, view_cnt, brand_id, board_name FROM article WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT a.article_id, a.user_id, a.title, a.content, a.created_at, a.updated_at, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.test_drive_available, a.view_cnt, a.brand_id, a.board_name FROM article a JOIN comment c ON a.article_id = c.article_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.article_id, a.user_id, a.title, a.content, a.created_at, a.updated_at, (SELECT ai.image_url FROM article_img ai WHERE ai.article_id = a.article_id ORDER BY ai.display_order, ai.article_img_id LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, a.test_drive_available, a.view_cnt, a.brand_id, a.board_name FROM article a JOIN article_like al ON a.article_id = al.article_id WHERE al.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, age = #{age}, email = #{email}, profile_img = #{profileImg} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
